name: Celestial Gold Ring
description: An exquisite 22K gold ring featuring a celestial-inspired design with delicate engravings. Handcrafted by master artisans, this piece embodies timeless elegance and sophistication. Perfect for special occasions or as a statement piece in your everyday collection.

name: Royal Diamond Necklace
description: A stunning diamond-studded necklace set in 18K white gold. Featuring a cascade of brilliant-cut diamonds that catch the light with every movement. This royal-inspired piece is the perfect companion for formal events and celebrations.

name: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Elegant freshwater pearl drop earrings with 14K gold hooks. These luminous pearls have been carefully selected for their perfect shape and iridescent luster. A versatile piece that transitions seamlessly from day to evening wear.

name: Sapphire Eternity Ring
description: A breathtaking eternity ring featuring channel-set blue sapphires in a platinum band. Each sapphire has been hand-selected for its vivid color and clarity. This ring symbolizes eternal love and commitment.

name: Emerald Pendant Necklace
description: A magnificent emerald pendant suspended from a delicate 18K gold chain. The centerpiece is a 2-carat Colombian emerald surrounded by a halo of micro-pavé diamonds. A true collector's piece that commands attention.

name: Diamond Hoop Earrings
description: Classic diamond hoop earrings reimagined with a modern twist. Featuring 48 brilliant-cut diamonds set in 18K rose gold, these hoops offer a perfect blend of contemporary style and timeless glamour.

name: Vintage Rose Gold Ring
description: A vintage-inspired rose gold ring featuring intricate filigree work and a central morganite gemstone. This romantic piece evokes the artistry of a bygone era while maintaining a distinctly modern appeal.

name: Layered Gold Necklace
description: A sophisticated layered necklace featuring three delicate 22K gold chains of varying lengths. Each chain is adorned with a unique pendant — a diamond solitaire, a gold disc, and a tiny star charm.

name: Ruby Stud Earrings
description: Exquisite ruby stud earrings set in 18K yellow gold. Each earring features a perfectly matched Burmese ruby with exceptional color saturation. These studs add a touch of regal elegance to any outfit.

name: Platinum Tennis Bracelet
description: A luxurious platinum tennis bracelet set with 36 round brilliant-cut diamonds totaling 5 carats. The four-prong setting maximizes light reflection, creating an unparalleled sparkle. The ultimate expression of refined luxury.

name: Gold Charm Bracelet
description: A playful yet elegant 22K gold charm bracelet featuring handcrafted charms including a heart, a star, a crescent moon, and a tiny key. Each charm tells a story, making this bracelet deeply personal and meaningful.

name: Art Deco Diamond Ring
description: An Art Deco-inspired diamond ring featuring geometric patterns and a central princess-cut diamond. Set in platinum with sapphire accents, this architectural masterpiece pays homage to the glamour of the 1920s.
